news.title: Butler Breaks Ground on Safety and Transit Hub, Advancing Vision for a More Connected Campus and Community
news.summary_en: With clouds clearing and the sun making a late cameo appearance, Butler University officially broke ground on its new Safety and Transit Hub—marking a significant step forward in the institution’s long-term Gateway Project strategy and its commitment to strengthening both campus operations and community connectivity.  Faculty, staff, trustees, construction partners, and community members gathered
news.author: Mark Apple
